files.patch:
@@ -3,1 +3,1 @@
-_nothing noteworthy, yet_
+* Support [Compact Source Files and Instance Main Methods](https://openjdk.org/jeps/512) in main tests [CODETOOLS-7904141](https://bugs.openjdk.org/browse/CODETOOLS-7904141)

@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@
- * Copyright (c) 2007, 2018, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
+ * Copyright (c) 2007, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
@@ -41,0 +41,1 @@
+    public static JDK_Version V25 = JDK_Version.forName("25");

@@ -28,0 +28,19 @@
+ifdef JDK8HOME
+
+$(BUILDTESTDIR)/CompactSourceFile8.ok: \
+	$(JTREG_IMAGEDIR)/lib/jtreg.jar \
+	$(JTREG_IMAGEDIR)/bin/jtreg
+	$(RM) $(@:%.ok=%) ; $(MKDIR) $(@:%.ok=%)
+	JTREG_JAVA=$(JDKJAVA) $(JTREG_IMAGEDIR)/bin/jtreg $(JTREG_OPTS) \
+		-w:$(@:%.ok=%)/work -r:$(@:%.ok=%)/report \
+		-jdk:$(JDK8HOME) \
+		$(TESTDIR)/compactsourcefile \
+			> $(@:%.ok=%/jt.log) 2>&1  || \
+		true "non-zero exit code from JavaTest intentionally ignored"
+	$(GREP) -s 'Test results: failed: 4' $(@:%.ok=%/jt.log)  > /dev/null
+	echo "test passed at `date`" > $@
+
+TESTS.jtreg += $(BUILDTESTDIR)/CompactSourceFile8.ok
+
+endif
+
@@ -30,1 +49,1 @@
-$(BUILDTESTDIR)/CompactSourceFile.ok: \
+$(BUILDTESTDIR)/CompactSourceFile25.ok: \
@@ -39,0 +58,1 @@
+	$(GREP) -s 'Test results: passed: 4' $(@:%.ok=%/jt.log)  > /dev/null
@@ -41,1 +61,1 @@
-TESTS.jtreg += $(BUILDTESTDIR)/CompactSourceFile.ok
+TESTS.jtreg += $(BUILDTESTDIR)/CompactSourceFile25.ok
